compiled_state.title: RED: Tests for ticket-clarity-check.sh scoring heuristic
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create tests/scripts/test-ticket-clarity-check.sh with behavioral tests exercising the ticket-clarity-check.sh scoring heuristic (SC2, SC6).

## Testing Strategy
Tests use --stdin flag to pipe JSON ticket fixtures directly to the script, bypassing the live ticket CLI. Each test creates a temp JSON fixture with ticket_type and description fields, pipes via stdin, asserts exit code and JSON output.

## Test Cases (12)
- test_empty_description: empty desc -> score 0, exit 1
- test_short_description: <100 chars -> score < 5, exit 1
- test_epic_with_success_criteria: "## Success Criteria" -> +2 type-specific
- test_bug_with_repro_steps: "## Reproduction Steps" -> +2 type-specific
- test_task_with_acceptance_criteria: "## Acceptance Criteria" -> +2 type-specific
- test_story_with_why_what: "## Why" + "## What" -> +2 type-specific
- test_length_200: >=200 chars -> +1
- test_length_500: >=500 chars -> +1 additional
- test_section_headers: ## lines -> +1
- test_bullet_lists: - lines -> +1
- test_threshold_override: custom threshold via temp config file -> verdict changes
- test_threshold_minimum: threshold=0 in config -> script uses minimum 1

## RED Marker
Add .test-index entry: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-clarity-check.sh: tests/scripts/test-ticket-clarity-check.sh [test_empty_description]

## NOTE
.test-index writes must be sequential with Task 3 (this task writes first).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-clarity-check.sh
- [ ] Test file is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-clarity-check.sh
- [ ] At least 12 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-clarity-check.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 12)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker entry exists
  Verify: grep -q "ticket-clarity-check" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
